name: Matrix
description: Matrix — Open federated protocol for real-time encrypted messaging with bridge support for other networks.

seo.title: Matrix — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Matrix: Matrix — Open federated protocol for real-time encrypted messaging with bridge support for other networks.

when_to_use: Federated encrypted messaging for OSS community
Self-hosted team chat bridged to Slack and Discord
End-to-end encrypted messaging for privacy-first apps
Bridge existing messaging platforms into unified Matrix room

pros: Open federated protocol with no single vendor
Built-in E2E encryption as a first-class feature
Rich bridge ecosystem to IRC, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp
cons: Operational burden of running a homeserver
Client and UX fragmentation across implementations
Performance of federated rooms can be uneven
Not a plug-and-play CPaaS for typical product teams
review.verdict: Great if you need open, federated, E2E-encrypted chat; expect real ops work, not a hosted API.
review.best_for: Privacy-focused orgs, governments, and devs needing self-hosted federated chat
review.not_for: Startups wanting a hosted SDK that just works without infra lifting
